point_support.reason: The local context describes Hitler's invasion of the Soviet Union in 1941, opening a two-front war [nda91043d_doc.txt:chunk_00015].
The local context states that four-fifths of all Wehrmacht soldiers who died in the war perished fighting the Red Army [nda91043d_doc.txt:chunk_00016].
The local context mentions that 27 million USSR citizens died in the war [nda91043d_doc.txt:chunk_00016].
The local context describes the Red Army's victory at Stalingrad and the annihilation of the German Sixth Army [nda91043d_doc.txt:chunk_00055].
The local context notes the Red Army's advance into East Prussia contributing to the defeat of Nazi Germany [nda91043d_doc.txt:chunk_00067].
